strategy: Do not drain and do not use Sun-symbol spells. Both trigger self-buffs or protection cheats, so build damage the plain way with blades and Feints.

Skip Death drains entirely. Hitting Jackson or his minions with a Drain either gives him an Aegis-protected +100% Balanceblade (if it doesn't kill) or a full heal (if it does), so a Scarecrow-style finisher backfires.
Avoid Sun-symbol spells (Sun Serpent, Ra, Climaclysm) unless they kill outright, since a survivor self-casts a protected universal Dispel that eats your next hit.
He is Death with 73% Death resist and takes 30% boosted Life, so bring a Life hitter or Life prisms and a normal (non-drain) attack school for the finish.
This is a team fight: 17,140 Health and three minions. One hitter, supports Feint the boss and blade the hitter, healer manages the group.
Stack blades and traps on one non-drain, non-Sun AoE and clear Jackson with his minions (Nandoor, Nadya, Robin) in a single burst to avoid the heal-on-kill cheat retriggering.
cheatNotes: If Jackson or a minion is hit by a Drain spell, that enemy self-casts in response, so avoid Death drains as your damage.
If the drain does not kill the target, it gains an Aegis-protected +100% Balanceblade, making it hit much harder.
If the drain does kill the target, it instead full-heals via Minor Blessing, undoing your damage.
If Jackson or a minion is hit by a Sun-symbol spell (Sun Serpent, Ra, Climaclysm) and survives, it self-casts a protected universal Dispel that blocks your next attack.
